newsArray.title: Sunrisers Hyderabad Equal Record Of Most 200+ Totals Against One Team In T20s
newsArray.description: Ishan Kishan and Heinrich Klaasen scored half-centuries on Wednesday to help SRH post a total of 235/4 against PBKS in the IPL 2026 match at Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium.
creator: harshit bisht

newsArray.title: 'Virus': Ponting Minces No Words As PBKS Drop Three Dollies; Chahal's Misfortune Continues - Watch
newsArray.description: PBKS dropped three catches and missed a stumping during their clash vs SRH in Hyderabad. The franchise's head coach Ricky Ponting minced no words and refused to give any excuses.
creator: aayush kataria

newsArray.title: आईपीएल के बीच पंजाब किंग्स के लिए आई बुरी खबर, पूर्व खिलाड़ी का निधन, क्रिकेट जगत में शोक की लहर
newsArray.description: IPL 2026 Punjab Kings: पंजाब किंग्स के पूर्व क्रिकेटर और पंजाब चयन समिति के सदस्य अमनप्रीत सिंह गिल का 36 वर्ष की आयु में निधन हो गया है. आईपीएल 2026 के बीच इस दुखद खबर से क्रिकेट जगत में शोक की लहर है.
creator: rohit raj

newsArray.title: India to allow Pakistani athletes in multilateral events; bilateral sports still suspended
newsArray.description: India will permit Pakistani athletes to participate in multilateral sporting events hosted in the country while continuing to suspend bilateral sports ties, including cricket, the sports ministry has said
creator: sports desk

newsArray.description: Whoever declared that volleyball should be the National game of Sri Lanka must be rolling in his or her grave if not kicking their heels as the sport has been dealt a virtual death blow in the cradle.
